description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single stage named build. Add a compile job in the build stage that runs the following shell commands: nix-build --argstr compiler ghc822, nix-build --argstr compiler ghc844, nix-build --argstr compiler ghc863, and rm -r result. Configure the job to publish all untracked files as artifacts by setting artifacts.untracked to true. No Docker image, services, caches, variables, or conditional rules are required.
